## Domain

What knowledge domain is this for? (e.g., legal, medical, research)

## Configuration

```hcl
project_name = ""
node_types   = []
edge_types   = []

surfacing_stale_days           =
surfacing_min_edges            =
surfacing_similarity_threshold = ""
```

## Use case

How would this domain use the knowledge graph?
